name: Choose a name for your committee
icon: Choose an icon URL for your committee, or remove this parameter to use the default committee icon

members.github_id: your-github-username to commit your answers in pull requests and approve other members answers
members.ethereum_address: your-ethereum-address to receive the committee earnings at the beginning of each month

members.github_id: you can have from 1 to 11 members in the 'members' array
members.ethereum_address: 'multisig' is the minimum number of member approvals required to merge pull requests
